'''Miat Temm''' was a [[Human/Legends|human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] who served as one of [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Gilad Pellaeon/Legends|Gilad Pellaeon's]] civilian aides in the [[Imperial Remnant]] during the early period of the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]]. She was [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]], and used this ability to shield her thoughts from other users of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]].

She met with [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]] on [[Bastion/Legends|Bastion]] in [[25 ABY/Legends|25 ABY]], when the latter was seeking the Remnant's aid in helping the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] fight the [[Yuuzhan Vong]].

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Dark Tide II: Ruin]]'' {{1st}}
